prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk".
First locate the bottom edge of Item 7's text:
- If the "Item 7A" heading is visible on this page, Item 7 ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise Item 7 runs all the way to the very bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 7 at that bottom edge — the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text: We are exposed to changes in interest rates as a result of our short-term borrowings and long-term debt. We hedge a portion of our interest rate risk by managing the mix of fixed and variable rate debt and by entering into interest rate swaps. For fiscal 2026, the net fair value of our interest rate swaps increased $0.2 billion primarily due to fluctuations in market interest rates.
